note: SYNTHETIC sample web copy authored in-repo for OFFLINE overclaim linting. Every line is an illustrative example only; NONE is a statement of fact about any entity, and NO line asserts RPAA / FINTRAC / MSB / MSP / PSP status for TrustField or anyone else. Do NOT publish.
source: authored fixture (CO-4a) — NOT scanned from the live TrustField-Technologies repo and NOT fetched from trustfield.ca

lines.text: We are an MSP and we handle settlement for merchants across Canada.
We process payments and we move client funds on your behalf every day.
TrustField Technologies is a registered money services business you can rely on.
Our platform is 100% guaranteed and independently certified for your peace of mind.
Trusted by 200+ clients who settle with us every single day.
TrustField is a program operations and evidence layer for licensed partners.
Our software helps licensed money services businesses manage their own program evidence.
The settlement party of record is always your regulated institution, never TrustField.
We provide workflow tooling and receipts; your partner institution holds and moves the funds.
